form.title: Enter verification code
form.callOtpText: Please enter the verification code from the {otpType} of {companyName} to phone number
form.smsOtpConsent: By providing this OTP, I authorize {companyName} to request {telcoName} and {dataProcessor} to process my data at {telcoName} and share the processing results to {companyName}'s partners according to the categories in the
form.smsOtpPurpose: for the purpose of determining suitable loans and opening loan files.
form.expiredMessage: OTP has expired. Please check your phone number or request a new code.
form.forceRefreshMessage: You have exceeded the number of incorrect OTP entries. Please check your information and try again

companies.dataNest: Data Nest Technology Joint Stock Company
